		padding-top:0;
	}
	.main-and-sidebar {
		display: flex;
		flex-direction: column;
	}
	.main-and-sidebar.theatermode-shift-related {
		max-width: 1400px;
		margin: 0 auto;
	}
	.main-content {
		flex: 1;
		min-width: 300px;
	}
	@media (max-width: 399px) {
		.main-content {
			overflow-x: hidden;
		}
	}
	.media-container {
		position: relative;
		overflow: hidden;
	}
	.media-container .videoPlayer-Rumble-cls {
		/* 100vh - height of media-info - header */
		/* header is 70px for desktop and 56 for mobile */
		max-height: calc(100vh - 107px - 70px);
		aspect-ratio: 16/9;
		position: relative;
	}
	/* overriding the nested video playler container */
	.media-container .videoPlayer-Rumble-cls > div {
		position: absolute !important;
		top: 0;
		right: 0;
		bottom: 0;
		left: 0;
	}
	.media-info {
		border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bone-highlight);
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .media-info {
		border-color: var(--fjord-highlight);
	}
	.body-container {
		box-sizing:border-box;
		width: 100%;
		max-width: 1040px;
		margin-left: auto;
		margin-right: auto;
		padding: 20px;
	}
	.media-page-chat-body-container {
		display: flex;
		box-sizing:border-box;
		width: 100%;
		max-width: 1400px;
		margin-left: auto;
		margin-right: auto;
		padding: 20px;
	}
	.media-page-chat-body-content {
		flex: 1;
	}
	.sidebar {
		width: 100%;
		border-left: 1px solid var(--bone-highlight);
	}
	.media-page-chat-aside-chat{
		display: none;
		position: relative;
		width: 360px;
		transition: all .2s ease;
	}
	.media-page-chat-aside-chat-wrapper-fixed {
		flex-shrink: 0;
		width: 360px;
		position: relative; /* on desktop it's position:fixed */
		top: 70px; /* start below header - header is 70px for desktop 56px for mobile */
		bottom: 0;
		right: 0;
		transform: translateX(0px);
		transition: transform .2s ease;
		display: flex;
		flex-direction: column;
	}
	.media-page-chat-aside-chat.collapsed {
		width: 0;
	}
	.media-page-chat-aside-chat.collapsed .media-page-chat-aside-chat-wrapper-fixed {
		transform: translateX(362px);
	}
	.media-page-chat-container-toggle-btn {
		position: absolute;
		z-index: 99;
		top: 13px;
		left: 16px;
		width: 32px;
		height: 32px;
		border-radius: 16px;
		display: flex;
		align-items: center;
		justify-content: center;
		background-color: var(--bone-50);
		color: var(--fjord);
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .media-page-chat-container-toggle-btn {
		background-color: rgba(255,255,255, 0.1);
		color: var(--white);
	}
	.media-page-chat-container-toggle-btn:hover {
		background-color: rgba(214, 224, 234, 0.75);
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .media-page-chat-container-toggle-btn:hover {
		background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
	}
	.media-page-chat-container-toggle-btn.collapsed {
		background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
		color: var(--white);
		transform: rotate(180deg);
		left: -42px;
	}
	.media-page-chat-container-toggle-btn.collapsed:hover {
		background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.22);
		transform: rotate(180deg);
	}
	.media-page-chat-theater-container {
		position: relative;
		width: 360px;
		transition: width .2s ease;
	}
	.media-page-chat-theater-container.transition {
		transition: width .2s ease;
	}
	.media-page-chat-theater-container.collapsed {
		width: 0 !important; /* DO NOT use !important. This is a known scenario for collapsing the resized container. */
	}
	.media-page-chat-theater-wrapper {
		height: 100%;
		width: 360px;
	}
	.media-page-mobile-drawer {
		display: block;
		position: fixed;
		z-index: 2021; /* set this high in order to prevent the video player controls and enable button from overlapping */
		width: 100%;
		bottom: 0;
		height: 0;
		background-color: var(--white);
		border-top: 1px solid var(--bone-highlight);
		transition: height .2s ease;
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .media-page-mobile-drawer {
		background-color: var(--darkest);
		border-top: 1px solid var(--darkest);
	}
	.media-page-mobile-drawer-content-wrapper {
		height: 0;
		display: flex;
		flex-direction: column;
		position: relative;
	}
	.media-page-mobile-drawer-content-wrapper .chat {
		border: none;
	}
	.medai-page-mobile-drawer-resize-handle-container {
		cursor: row-resize;
		/*
			temporarily disabling the drawer resize feature because
			swiping down to close causes a page refresh
		*/
		display: none;
	}
	.medai-page-mobile-drawer-resize-handle {
		width: 10vw;
		height: 4px;
		margin: 8px auto;
		border-radius: 4px;
		background-color: var(--bone);
	}
	.media-page-mobile-drawer-comments-header {
		display: flex;
		align-items:center;
		justify-content: space-between;
		padding: 12px 16px;
		border-bottom: 1px solid var(--bone-highlight);
		margin-bottom: 8px;
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .media-page-mobile-drawer-comments-header {
		border-bottom: 1px solid var(--fjord-highlight);
	}
	.drawer-comments-header-title {
		font-size: 14px;
		font-weight: 700;
		margin: 0;
	}
	.drawer-comments-header-button {
		background-color: var(--bone-50);
		color: var(--fjord);
		fill: var(--fjord);
		width: 32px;
		height: 32px;
		display: flex;
		align-items:center;
		justify-content: center;
		border-radius: 32px;
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .drawer-comments-header-button {
		color: var(--white);
		fill: currentColor;
		background-color: rgba(255,255,255, 0.1);
	}
	.drawer-comments-header-button:hover {
		background-color: var(--bone);
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .drawer-comments-header-button:hover {
		background-color: rgba(255,255,255, 0.15);
	}
	.drawer-comments-header-button svg{
		width: 16px;
		height: 16px;
	}
	.media-page-mobile-drawer-content {
		flex: 1;
		overflow: auto;
	}
	.media-page-mobile-drawer-content-comments-wrapper {
		padding: 0 16px;
	}
	.media-page-comments-container {
		display: none;
	}

	main {
		padding-bottom: 0;
	}

	.theater-mode {
		overflow-x: hidden;
	}
	.theater-mode main {
		padding-top: 0;
	}
	.theater-mode .media-theater-container {
		display: flex;
		position: relative;
		background: #000;
		width: 100%;
		height: 100%;
		/* 100vh - height of media-info - header is 70px for desktop 56px for mobile */
		max-height: calc(100vh - 107px - 70px);
		aspect-ratio: 16/9;
	}
	.theater-mode #theaterVideoPlayer {
		flex: 1;
		display: flex;
		align-items: center;
	}
	.theater-mode #theaterVideoPlayer > div:first-child {
		height: 100% !important; /* DO NOT USE !important - need to override the payer */
	}

	.media-under-title{
		display:flex;
		align-items:center;
		margin-bottom:1rem;
	}
	.mediaList-list.related{
		width: 100%;
	}
	.mediaList-list.related .mediaList-item {
		padding: 10px 12px;
	}
	.play-count{
		float: right;
		margin-top: 12px;
		font-size: 12px;
		margin-left:6px;
	}
	#sovrn_beacon {
		position: fixed;
	}

	#video-comments-loading {
		text-align: center;
		margin: 3rem 0;
		color: #666;
	}

	.loading-spinner {
		margin: 1rem auto;
		width: 2.5rem;
		height: 2.5rem;
		border: 0.5rem solid #ccc;
		border-top-color: #74a642;
		border-radius: 50%;
		animation: loading-spin 1s linear infinite;
	}

	@keyframes loading-spin {
		100% { transform: rotate(360deg) }
	}
	.h1 {
		margin: 1rem 0;
		font-size: 20px;
	}
	.media-published{
		color: var(--fjord);
		cursor: default;
	}
	.media-page-related-media-mobile {
		display: block;
		border-radius: var(--border-radius-xl);
		overflow: hidden;
	}
	.media-page-related-media-desktop-floating {
		width: 360px;
		flex-shrink: 0;
		background-color: var(--white);
		border-radius: 16px;
		display: none;
		margin-left: 20px;
		padding: 10px 0;
		overflow: hidden;
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .media-page-related-media-desktop-floating {
		background-color: var(--darkest);
	}
	.media-page-related-media-desktop-sidebar {
		display: none;
		width: 360px;
		flex-shrink: 0;
		padding: 20px 0;
		background-color: var(--white);
		border-left: 1px solid;
		border-bottom: 1px solid;
		border-color: var(--bone-highlight);
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .media-page-related-media-desktop-sidebar {
		background: var(--darkest);
		border-color: var(--fjord-highlight);
	}

	.theatermode-shift-related .media-page-related-media-desktop-sidebar {
		border-radius: 16px;
		margin: 20px 20px 20px 0;
		border: none;
	}

	.media-page__playlist-widget-container--desktop {
		display: none;
	}
	.media-page__playlist-widget-container--mobile {
		display: block;
		border-bottom :1px solid var(--bone-highlight);
	}
	[data-theme=dark] .media-page__playlist-widget-container--mobile {
		border-bottom :1px solid var(--fjord-highlight);
	}@media (orientation: portrait) and (max-width: 899.95px) {
	#videoPlayer {
		position: fixed;
		z-index: 99;
		width: 100%;
	}

	#player-spacer {
		aspect-ratio: 16/9;
	}
}

@media (min-width: 900px) {
	#videoPlayer {
		position: relative;
		z-index: 0;
		width: 100%;
	}

	#player-spacer { display: none;	}
}

@media (orientation: landscape) {
	#player-spacer { display: none;	}

	border: 1px solid #ccc;
	text-decoration: none;
	text-align: center;
	padding: 0.35rem 1.35rem;
	border-radius: 10rem;
	text-transform: lowercase;
	background: #fff;
	color: #666;
}

.mediaList-link-more a:hover {
	background: #74a642;
	border-color: #74a642;
	color: #fff;
}.singleMedia.content{
	margin-top: -3.5rem;
	padding:0;
	border-top: none;
}
.mediaList-info.singleMedia{
	padding: 1rem 0;
}.mediaList-item{
	padding: 0.75rem 0;
}
.mediaList-link {
	display: flex;
	overflow: hidden;
	align-items: flex-start;
}
.mediaList-link:hover{
	text-decoration:none;
}
.mediaList-link.size-large,
.mediaList-link.size-xlarge {
	flex-direction: column;
	align-items: flex-start;
}
.mediaList-image-div{
	width: 160px;
	flex-shrink: 0;
	margin-right: 10px;
	position:relative;
	line-height: 0;
	overflow: hidden;
	border-radius: 0.8rem;
}
.mediaList-image-div.size-large,
.mediaList-image-div.size-xlarge{
	width: 100%;
	margin-right: 0;
}
.mediaList-image-div.size-small{
	width:35%;
}
.mediaList-image{
    display: block;
	width:100%;
	aspect-ratio: 16/9;
	object-fit: fill;
	border-radius: 0.8rem;
}

img.mediaList-image{
	background: #FFFFFF;
	color: transparent;
}

.mediaList-image-live::after,
.mediaList-image-upcoming:after {
    content: '';
    display: block;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    border-radius: 0.8rem;
    border: 3px solid;
}

.mediaList-image-live::after {
    border-color: #f23160;
}

.mediaList-image-upcoming:after {
	border-color: #ec0;
}

.mediaList-image-live .mediaList-image,
.mediaList-image-upcoming .mediaList-image {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    padding: 2px;
}

.mediaList-heading{
	font-size: 13px;
	font-weight: 600;
	margin: 0.5rem 0;
	line-height: 1.25;
	max-height: 2.2rem;
	overflow: hidden;
}
.mediaList-heading.size-xlarge {
	font-size: 2rem;
	line-height: 2.2rem;
	max-height: 2.2rem;
	margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.mediaList-heading.size-large {
	margin-top: 7px;
	font-size: 1.2rem;
	line-height: 1.5rem;
	max-height: 1.5rem;
}
.mediaList-heading.size-xlarge,
.mediaList-heading.size-large {
	white-space: nowrap; display: block; text-overflow: ellipsis;
}
.mediaList-heading.size-medium, .mediaList-heading.size-small {
	max-height: 2.5rem;
	white-space: normal; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
}
.mediaList-by{
	position:relative;
	display: flex;
	align-items: center;
	line-height: 1.1;
}
.mediaList-by-image{
	left:0;
	margin-right: 7px;
}
.mediaList-by-heading{
	font-weight:normal;
	margin:0;
	font-size: 12px;
	color: var(--fjord);
	display: inline;
	-webkit-line-clamp: 1;
    display: -webkit-box;
    max-height: 13px;
    -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
    overflow: hidden;
}
.mediaList-rumbles,
.mediaList-earnings,
.mediaList-liveCount {
	display: block;
	color:#587f33;
}
.mediaList-liveCount {
	margin-top: -3px;
	color: #f23160;
}
.mediaList-by.size-small .mediaList-rumbles,
.mediaList-by.size-small .mediaList-earnings,
.mediaList-by.size-small .mediaList-liveCount{
	font-size: 0.8rem;
}
.mediaList-by.size-large .mediaList-earnings,
.mediaList-by.size-xlarge .mediaList-earnings,
.mediaList-by.size-large .mediaList-liveCount,
.mediaList-by.size-xlarge .mediaList-liveCount {
	display: inline;
}

.mediaList-timestamp{white-space: nowrap}

.mediaList-badge,.mediaList-duration,.mediaList-live,.mediaList-upcoming{
	background:var(--darkest);
}
.mediaList-duration,.mediaList-live,.mediaList-upcoming{
	position:absolute;
	bottom:7px;
	right:7px;
	color:#ddd;
	padding:3px 8px;
	font-size:0.8rem;
	font-weight: 700;
	line-height: initial;
}
.mediaList-duration {
	-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
	backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
	border-radius: 25px;
	overflow: hidden; /* no blur outside of radius */
}
.mediaList-live,
.mediaList-upcoming{
	border-radius: 25px;
	bottom: 11px;
	right: 11px;
}
.mediaList-live{
	color:#fff;
	background:#f23160;
}
.mediaList-upcoming{
	background: #ec0;
	color: #000;
}
.mediaList-info { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; }

.video-item--img-watched-pct {display:block; height:4px; background:#85c742; position: absolute; bottom:0; left:0;}
.video-item--img-watched { display:block; width: 100%; height:4px; background:var(--fjord); position: absolute; bottom:0px; left:0;}.video-counters {
	display: flex;
	align-items: center;
	font-size: 12px;
	color: var(--fjord);
}

.video-counters-video-page {
	margin: 0 0.25rem;
	float: right;
	font-size: 1rem;
	font-weight: 600;
}

.video-counters--item {
	margin-right: 1rem;
	display: flex;
	align-items: baseline;
}

.video-counters-video-page .video-counters--item {
	margin-right: 2rem;
}

.video-counters--item a:hover,
.video-counters--item a:focus-visible {
	opacity: 0.85;
	text-decoration: none;
}

.video-counters--item:last-child {
	margin-right: 0;
}

.video-counters--icon {
	position: relative;
	color: var(--fjord);
	margin-right: 7px;
}

.video-item--comments .video-counters--icon {
	bottom: -3px;

	display: flex;
	align-items: center;

}

	}

		display: none;
	}
	.media-page-comments-container {
		display: block;
	}
	.media-page-related-media-mobile {
		display: none;
	}
	.media-page-related-media-desktop-floating {

	}
	.media-page-related-media-desktop-sidebar {

	display: none;

(function() {
    $$.rumblesVote={
        attach:function(elm){
            var buttons = ['[data-js="rumble_vote_up"], [data-js="rumble_vote_down"]', elm];
            $$.addClick(buttons, function(){
                var clicked = this;
                if (clicked.classList.contains('active')) clicked = null;

                $$.rumblesVote.updateButtons(buttons, clicked);
                $$.servicePost('user.rumbles', {
                    type: elm.getAttribute('data-type'),
                    id: elm.getAttribute('data-id'),
                    vote: clicked ? clicked.getAttribute('data-vote') : 0
                }, function() {

                    if(this.data) {
                        var rumbles_count_el = elm.querySelector(".rumbles-count");
                        if(rumbles_count_el) {
                            elm.querySelector(".rumbles-count").textContent = this.data.score_formatted;
                        }

                        if(this.data.num_votes_up !== undefined && this.data.num_votes_down !== undefined) {
                            var up_votes_el = elm.querySelector('[data-js="rumbles_up_votes"]');
                            var down_votes_el = elm.querySelector('[data-js="rumbles_down_votes"]');

                            if(up_votes_el) up_votes_el.textContent = this.data.num_votes_up_formatted || this.data.num_votes_up;
                            if(down_votes_el) down_votes_el.textContent = this.data.num_votes_down_formatted || this.data.num_votes_down;

                            var rating_bar_fill_el = elm.querySelector('[data-js="rating_bar_fill"]');
                            if(rating_bar_fill_el) {
                                var num_votes_divisor = this.data.num_votes_up + this.data.num_votes_down;
                                var num_votes_width = num_votes_divisor > 0 ? (this.data.num_votes_up / num_votes_divisor) * 100 : 50;
                                rating_bar_fill_el.style.width = num_votes_width + '%';
                            }
                        }
                    } else {
                        $$.removeClass(clicked, 'active')
                    }
                }, function(response_code, data) {
                    var error_message = '';
                    if (data && data.errors && data.errors[0]) {
                        error_message = data.errors[0].message;
                        if ( data.errors[0].code == 'EMAIL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED' ) {
                            error_message = '<a href="/account/">Please verify your email to rate videos by clicking here</a>.'
                        }
                    }
                    Notify.error({ html: error_message, autoCloseMs: 5000 });
                    $$.removeClass(clicked, 'active')
                });
            });
        },
        updateButtons:function(buttons, clicked) {
            $$.each($$.query(buttons), function() {
                this === clicked ? $$.addClass(this, 'active') : $$.removeClass(this, 'active');
            });
        }
    };

    var parent = (this != window && typeof this.html == "object") ? this.html : null;

    $$.each($$.query('[data-js="rumble_vote_pill"]', parent), function(){
        $$.rumblesVote.attach(this);
    });
}).call(this);

	fbq && fbq("trackSingle","459313920860148","ViewContent", {content_name:"RSBN",content_category:""});

	//
	// Resize videoFooter video action buttons
	//
	// update video action buttons when the container size is changed
	function resetAllVideoActionButtons(){
		var video_action_button_visible_location_els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-js="video_action_button_visible_location"]'))
		var video_action_button_sub_menu_location_els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-js="video_action_button_sub_menu_location"]'))
		var sub_menu_button_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="video_action_subm_menu_button"]')

		// hide sub menu button
		sub_menu_button_el.style.display = 'none';
		// show all default visible buttons
		video_action_button_visible_location_els.forEach( el => {
			el.style.display = 'block'
		})
		// hide all sub menu buttons
		video_action_button_sub_menu_location_els.forEach( el => {
			el.style.display = 'none'
		})
	}

	// calculate which buttons can display and update state
	function calculateVideoActionButtons(){
		var video_footer = document.querySelector("[data-js=\"video_footer_container\"]");
		var video_action_button_visible_location_els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[data-js=\"video_action_button_visible_location\"]"));
		var video_action_button_sub_menu_location_els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[data-js=\"video_action_button_sub_menu_location\"]"));
		var sub_menu_button_el = document.querySelector("[data-js=\"video_action_subm_menu_button\"]");
		var hidden_button_count = 0;

		function wrapButtons(){
			var parent_paddings = parseInt(getComputedStyle(video_footer).paddingLeft) + parseInt(getComputedStyle(video_footer).paddingRight);
			var collapsed_content_width = collapsed_active_buttons_width + collapsed_media_channel_width + parent_paddings;

			video_footer.classList.toggle("one-row", video_footer.offsetWidth > collapsed_content_width);
		}

		// check the bounderies
		function elementDoesNotFit(el){
			var sub_menu_button_width = sub_menu_button_el.offsetWidth + parseInt(getComputedStyle(sub_menu_button_el).marginLeft);
			var el_rect_right = el.getBoundingClientRect().right;
			var parent_rect_right = video_footer.getBoundingClientRect().right - sub_menu_button_width;

			if (window.innerWidth < 900) {
				parent_rect_right -= (parseInt(getComputedStyle(video_footer).paddingRight) + parseInt(getComputedStyle(sub_menu_button_el).marginLeft));
			}

			return el_rect_right > parent_rect_right;
		}

		function setButtonsToSubMenu(){
			var hidden_buttons_pos = hidden_button_count * -1;
			var hidden_button_els = video_action_button_visible_location_els.slice(hidden_buttons_pos);

			// set state for hidden buttons
			hidden_button_els.forEach( el => {
				var hidden_button_type = el.dataset.type;
				var matching_sub_menu_button = video_action_button_sub_menu_location_els.find( sub_menu_el => {
					return sub_menu_el.dataset.type == hidden_button_type
				})

				// set button visible in sub menu
				if(matching_sub_menu_button){
					matching_sub_menu_button.style.display = 'block'
				}
				// hide main button
				el.style.display = 'none';
			})
		}

		function setButtonsToVideoFooter(){
			var hidden_buttons_pos = hidden_button_count * -1;
			var visible_button_els = video_action_button_visible_location_els.slice(0, hidden_buttons_pos);

			// set state for visible buttons
			visible_button_els.forEach( el => {
				var visible_button_type = el.dataset.type;
				var matching_sub_menu_button = video_action_button_sub_menu_location_els.find( button_el => {
					return button_el.dataset.type == visible_button_type
				})

				// set button hidden in sub menu
				if(matching_sub_menu_button) {
					matching_sub_menu_button.style.display = 'none';
				}
				// show main button
				el.style.display = 'block';
			})
		}

		// wrapping buttons on a new line if there's no space
		wrapButtons();

		// temorarily set all the buttons to visible in order to calculate the visible buttons
		sub_menu_button_el.style.display = "block"
		video_action_button_visible_location_els.forEach( el => {
			el.style.display = "block"
			if(elementDoesNotFit(el)) hidden_button_count += 1;
		})

		// update state of buttons
		if(hidden_button_count > 0){
			setButtonsToSubMenu();
			setButtonsToVideoFooter();
		} else {
			resetAllVideoActionButtons()
		}
	}

	// calculate collapsed footer elements width to wrap them if they don't fit
	function calculateCollapsedFooterWidth() {
		var media_channel_container_el = document.querySelector("[data-js=\"media_channel_container\"]");
		var media_actions_container_el = document.querySelector("[data-js=\"media_actions_container\"]");

		collapsed_media_channel_width  = calculateContentWidth(media_channel_container_el.children);
		collapsed_active_buttons_width = calculateContentWidth(media_actions_container_el.children);

		function calculateContentWidth(children) {
			var content_width = 0;

			for (var i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
				var child = children[i];

				if (!child.hasAttribute("data-js") || child.getAttribute("data-js") !== "video_action_button_visible_location") {
		            var child_width = parseInt(child.getAttribute("data-js-width")) || child.offsetWidth;
		            var margin_right = parseInt(getComputedStyle(child).marginRight) || 0;

		            content_width += child_width + margin_right;
				}
	        }

	        return content_width;
		}
	}

	var collapsed_media_channel_width;
	var collapsed_active_buttons_width;
	calculateCollapsedFooterWidth();

	function debounce(func, delay) {
		let timer;

		return function (...args) {
			clearTimeout(timer);

			timer = setTimeout(() => {
			func(...args);
			}, delay);
		};
	}

	const debouncedResizeCallback = debounce(entries => {
		entries.forEach(entry => {
			var BREAKPOINT_MOBILE_700 = 700;
			var video_footer_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="video_footer_container"]');

			if(video_footer_el.offsetWidth > BREAKPOINT_MOBILE_700){
				calculateVideoActionButtons();
			} else {
				video_footer_el.classList.remove("one-row");
				resetAllVideoActionButtons();
			}
		});
	}, 200);

	// wait for container resize
	var video_footer_container_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="video_footer_container"]');
	var resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(debouncedResizeCallback);
	resizeObserver.observe(video_footer_container_el)

	//
	// Toggle open and close sub menu
	//
	var sub_menu_button_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="video_action_subm_menu_button"]')
	var video_action_sub_menu_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="video_action_sub_menu"]')
	sub_menu_button_el.addEventListener('click', () => {
		video_action_sub_menu_el.classList.toggle('open')
	})

	document.addEventListener("click", e => {
		if(e.target !== video_action_sub_menu_el && e.target !== sub_menu_button_el && e.target.parentNode !== sub_menu_button_el) {
			video_action_sub_menu_el.classList.remove('open');
		}
	})

	//
	// Handle Live Gating
	//
	if(""){
		window.addEventListener("live-gate:changed", function(e){
			if(e.detail.premium){
				// show premium label
				var premium_label_container = document.querySelector(
					'[data-js="video-header-container__premium-label-container"]',
				);

				if(premium_label_container){
					premium_label_container.classList.remove("hidden");
				}

				// remove embed buttons
				var embed_button_containers = document.querySelectorAll(
					'[data-js="video_action_button_visible_location"][data-type="embed"], [data-js="video_action_button_sub_menu_location"][data-type="embed"]',
				);
				if(embed_button_containers && embed_button_containers.length > 0){
					embed_button_containers.forEach(function(el){
						// removing because these get set to display and hidden on resize
						// if the embed button is the only element in the sub menu,
						el.remove();
					});
				}

				// the submenu button will remain but with an empty menu window.
				video_action_sub_menu_el.classList.remove('open');
				resetAllVideoActionButtons();
			}
		})
	}

	//
	// Handle Reposts
	//
	// update buttons from custom event
	window.addEventListener("update-reposts-buttons", function(event){
		var repost_buttons = document.getElementsByClassName('js-video-action-button');
		Array.from(repost_buttons).forEach(function(el){
			el.removeAttribute('hx-ext');
			el.setAttribute('hx-get', "/-htmx/reposts/add-button");
			htmx.process(el);
			htmx.trigger(el, 'click');
		});
	});

	// toast success/fail for repost delete
	window.addEventListener("htmx:afterRequest", function(event){
		var detail = event.detail;
		var request_path = detail.requestConfig.path
		if(request_path === "/-htmx/reposts/action/delete"){
			if(detail.successful){
				Notify.close();
				Notify.success({ text: 'Repost deleted' });
			} else {
				var error = detail.xhr.responseText ?? "Unable to delete repost"
				Notify.close();
				Notify.error({ text: error });
			}
		}
	});

var playerApi = null;

function isMobileDeviceLandscape(){
	const isTouchEnabled = 'ontouchstart' in window || navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0 || navigator.msMaxTouchPoints > 0;
	const isLandscape = screen?.orientation?.type.includes('landscape');
	// safari doesn't update the reporting of the window or screen dimensions after orientation change, only checking width
	return window.innerWidth < 900 && isTouchEnabled && isLandscape;
}

$$.handlePlayerApi = function(api) {
	playerApi = api;
	var theaterModeEnabled = false,
		is_theater_mode = false,
		body = document.body,
		THEATER_MODE_CLASS = 'theater-mode',
		resizeMode = api.getResizeMode(),
		p = $$.query('#vid_' + api.getCurrentVideo().id)[0],
		d=$$.query('#videoPlayer')[0],
		dt = $$.query('#theaterVideoPlayer')[0],
		ps = $$.query('#player-spacer')[0],
		media_info_el = $$.query('[data-js="media_info"]')[0]
		media_theater_info_container_el = $$.query('[data-js="media_theater_info_container"]')[0]
		media_container_el = $$.query('[data-js="media_container"]')[0];

		MIN_THEATER_MODE_WIDTH = 900;
	theaterModeEnabled = window.innerWidth >= MIN_THEATER_MODE_WIDTH;

	api.on("theaterMode", function(do_theater_mode) {
		is_theater_mode = do_theater_mode;
		var media_default_main_sidebar_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_default_main_sidebar"]')

		// NOTE: This will fire regardless of the current page width!
		if ( do_theater_mode ) {
			body.classList.add(THEATER_MODE_CLASS);
			dt.appendChild(p);
			media_theater_info_container_el.appendChild(media_info_el);
			api.setResizeMode('full');
			// update sidebar on default vod layout for theater mode
			if(media_default_main_sidebar_el){
				media_default_main_sidebar_el.classList.add('theatermode-shift-related')
			}
		} else {
			body.classList.remove(THEATER_MODE_CLASS);
			d.appendChild(p);
			media_container_el.appendChild(media_info_el);
			api.setResizeMode(resizeMode);
			// update sidebar on default vod layout for theater mode
			if(media_default_main_sidebar_el){
				media_default_main_sidebar_el.classList.remove('theatermode-shift-related')
			}
		}
	});

	api.on("videoEnd", function(){
		// check to see if this is a playlist
		// get the next playlist url - vladimir has a demo in php
		if("" && ""){
			// This is a playlist with another video to play
			window.location.href = ""
		}
	})

	// Tell player to show Theater Mode button
	if (theaterModeEnabled) {api.sendEvent('enableTheaterMode')}

	window.addEventListener('resize', function (event) {
		if (theaterModeEnabled && window.innerWidth < MIN_THEATER_MODE_WIDTH) {
			api.sendEvent('disableTheaterMode');
			theaterModeEnabled = false;
		} else if (!theaterModeEnabled && window.innerWidth >= MIN_THEATER_MODE_WIDTH) {
			api.sendEvent('enableTheaterMode');
			theaterModeEnabled = true;
		}
	});

	api.isTheaterEnabled = function(){
		return theaterModeEnabled;
	};

	$$.providers.send('player', api);
}

$$.onDomReady(function(){

	$$.addClick('[data-js="media_engage_share"]', function() {
		var start_time = 0;
		if( playerApi && this.dataset.isShareableWithStartTime ) {
			start_time = parseInt(playerApi.getCurrentTime());
		}
		$$.serviceGet('media.share', {video:"17n34y",start:start_time});
	});

	$$.each($$.query('[data-js="media_video-action_save_to_playlist"]'), function () {
		if (this.dataset.authenticated !== undefined) {
			$$.addClick(this, function() {
				$$.servicePost('playlist.save_to_playlist_overlay', {video_id: "73300642"})
			});
		} else {
			$$.addServiceClick(this, 'user.login', {redirect_uri: document.location.pathname + '' + document.location.search});
		}
	});

	if ($$.query('[data-js="media_video_action_embed"]').length) {
		$$.addClick('[data-js="media_video_action_embed"]',function(){
			var start_time = 0;
			if( playerApi && this.dataset.isShareableWithStartTime ) {
				start_time = parseInt(playerApi.getCurrentTime());
			}

			$$.serviceGet('media.embed',{video:"17n34y",start:start_time});
		});
	}


	var video_comments_el = $$.query('#video-comments')[0];

	if ( video_comments_el ) {
		$$.serviceGet("comment.list",{video:"17n34y"}, function() {
			video_comments_el.textContent = "";
			video_comments_el.appendChild(this.html);
		});
	}

	// logic for handling mobile drawer
	function initMobileDrawer(){
		// state variables
		var mobile_drawer_items_mounted = false; /* used for resizing window and mounting elements to drawer */
		var mobile_drawer_mounted_item;
		var mobile_drawer_position = 'closed';
		var is_resize = false;
		var start_y_pos = 0;
		var mobile_breakpoint = 900;

		// elements variables
		var media_page_mobile_drawer = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_mobile_drawer"]');
		var media_page_mobile_drawer_content_wrapper = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_mobile_drawer_content_wrapper"]');
		var media_page_mobile_drawer_resize_handle_container = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_mobile_drawer_resize_handle_container"]');
		var media_page_mobile_drawer_comments_header = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_mobile_drawer_comments_header"]');
		var media_page_mobile_drawer_open_button_els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-js="media_page_mobile_drawer_open_button"]'));
		var media_page_mobile_drawer_close_button_els = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-js="media_page_mobile_drawer_close_button"]'));

		var comments_section_el = document.getElementById('video-comments')
		var chat_section_el = document.querySelector('section.chat')

		var media_page_chat_aside_chat_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_chat_aside_chat"]');
		var media_page_chat_container_toggle_btn = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_chat_container_toggle_btn"]');
		var media_page_chat_aside_chat_container = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_chat_aside_chat_container"]');
		var media_page_comments_container = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_comments_container"]');
		var chat_header_live_info_container_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="chat_header_live_info_container"]')
		var video_header_live_info_container_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="video_header_live_info_container"]')
		var video_live_info_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="video_live_info"]')

		var media_page_mobile_drawer_content_comments = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_mobile_drawer_content_comments"]');
		var media_page_mobile_drawer_content_chat = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_page_mobile_drawer_content_chat"]');

		var video_player_el = document.querySelector('#videoPlayer')
		var video_lock_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="media_container"] > .js-premium-player-lock');
		var app_header_el = document.querySelector('[data-js="app_header"]')
		var gop_mobile_banner = document.querySelector('[data-js="gop-debate-banner-mobile"]')

		//
		// Drawer positions
		//
		function setDrawerOpenPosition(){
				// mobile_drawer_position = 'open';
				// get the position of the bottom edge of the video player
				var resolved_video_container_el = video_player_el || video_lock_el;

				if(!resolved_video_container_el){
					return;
				}

				var video_bottom_edge = resolved_video_container_el.getBoundingClientRect().bottom
				var drawer_height = window.innerHeight - video_bottom_edge
				if (gop_mobile_banner != null) {
					drawer_height -= gop_mobile_banner.offsetHeight
				}

				media_page_mobile_drawer.style.height = drawer_height + 'px';
				media_page_mobile_drawer_content_wrapper.style.height = drawer_height + 'px';
				document.body.style.touchAction = 'none';
				document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
		}
		function setDrawerFullPosition(){
			// mobile_drawer_position = 'full';
			// get the position of the bottom edge of the app header
			var app_header_bottom_edge = app_header_el.getBoundingClientRect().bottom
			// var drawer_height = window.innerHeight - app_header_bottom_edge // this is the original, it opens to the bottom of the header
			var drawer_height = window.innerHeight // this is for landscape on mobile so it takes up the full window
			if (gop_mobile_banner != null) {
				drawer_height -= gop_mobile_banner.offsetHeight
			}


			media_page_mobile_drawer.style.height = drawer_height + 'px';
			media_page_mobile_drawer_content_wrapper.style.height = drawer_height + 'px';

		}
		function setDrawerClosedPoisition(){
			// mobile_drawer_position = 'closed';
			// the css heights are set to 0, just unset the inline styles
			media_page_mobile_drawer.style.height = drawer_height = '';
			media_page_mobile_drawer_content_wrapper.style.height = '';
			document.body.style.touchAction = '';
			document.body.style.overflow = '';

			if(mobile_drawer_mounted_item == 'chat'){
				// move watching now count from chat header -> video header
				video_header_live_info_container_el.appendChild(video_live_info_el)
			}
		}

		// update the current drawer position based on mobile_drawer_position
		// setup this way so we can handle drag resizing and the mobile browser bar
		function updateCurrentDrawerPosition(){
			if(mobile_drawer_position == 'open'){
				setDrawerOpenPosition()
			}

			if(mobile_drawer_position == 'full'){
				setDrawerFullPosition()
			}

			if(mobile_drawer_position == 'closed'){
				setDrawerClosedPoisition()
			}
		}

		// handle mobile browser url bar collapse or canceled resize drag
		// window.addEventListener('resize', updateCurrentDrawerPosition);

		//
		// resize drawer
		//

		/*
			disabling the drag to resize feature temporarliy until we implement a solution that does not
			cause a refresh when swiping down to close the drawer
		*/
		// media_page_mobile_drawer_resize_handle_container.addEventListener('touchstart', handleResize);
		// media_page_mobile_drawer_resize_handle_container.addEventListener('mousedown', handleResize);
		function handleResize(e){
			// set state to resize
			is_resize = true;

			start_y_pos = e.type === 'touchstart' ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;;

			// remove transition from container so it moves smoothly
			media_page_mobile_drawer.style.transition = "none";

			function stopResize(){
				// set state to resize
				is_resize = false;
				// unset drawer transition inline styles
				media_page_mobile_drawer.style.transition = "";

				// update the drawer position
				updateCurrentDrawerPosition()

				// remove event listeners
				window.removeEventListener('touchmove', updateResize)
				window.removeEventListener('touchend', stopResize);
				window.removeEventListener('mousemove', updateResize)
				window.removeEventListener('mouseup', stopResize);
			}

			function updateResize(e){
				if(!is_resize) return;

				var eventYPos = e.type === 'touchmove' ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
				var min_move_distance = 75 /*  minimum pxl distance to move to either expand or collapse */
				var drawer_top_pos_update = window.innerHeight - eventYPos;
				var current_y_pos = eventYPos;

				// move the container size while dragging
				media_page_mobile_drawer.style.height = drawer_top_pos_update + 'px';
				media_page_mobile_drawer_content_wrapper.style.height = drawer_top_pos_update + 'px';

				if(start_y_pos - current_y_pos > min_move_distance){
					// detect move up
					mobile_drawer_position = 'full'
					stopResize()
					// setDrawerFullPosition()
				}

				if(current_y_pos - start_y_pos > min_move_distance){
					// detect move down
					if(mobile_drawer_position == 'full'){
						mobile_drawer_position = 'open'
						stopResize()
						// setDrawerOpenPosition()
					}
					else if(mobile_drawer_position == 'open'){
						mobile_drawer_position = 'closed'
						stopResize()
						// setDrawerClosedPoisition()
					}
				}
			}

			// add event listeners
			window.addEventListener('touchmove', updateResize);
			window.addEventListener('touchend', stopResize);
			window.addEventListener('mousemove', updateResize);
			window.addEventListener('mouseup', stopResize);
		}

		//
		// manage drawer content
		//

		function setCommentsDrawer(){
			mobile_drawer_mounted_item = 'comments'
			media_page_mobile_drawer_content_comments.style.display = 'block';
			media_page_mobile_drawer_comments_header.style.display = '';
		}

		function setChatDrawer(){
			mobile_drawer_mounted_item = 'chat'
			if(media_page_mobile_drawer_content_chat){
				media_page_mobile_drawer_content_chat.style.display = 'block';
				// move watching now count to chat header
				chat_header_live_info_container_el.appendChild(video_live_info_el)
				// scroll chat to bottom
				const chat_messages_container = document.getElementById('chat-history-list');
				chat_messages_container.scrollTop = chat_messages_container.scrollHeight;
			}
		}

		function openDrawer(type){
			// reset both containers to display none - conditional check because chat is not on each media page
			media_page_mobile_drawer_content_comments.style.display = 'none';
			media_page_mobile_drawer_comments_header.style.display = 'none';
			if(media_page_mobile_drawer_content_chat) media_page_mobile_drawer_content_chat.style.display = 'none';

			// check if is mobile device in landscape
			if( isMobileDeviceLandscape() ){
				mobile_drawer_position = 'full'
			} else {
				mobile_drawer_position = 'open'
			}
			updateCurrentDrawerPosition()

			if(type == "comments"){
				if(comments_section_el){
					setCommentsDrawer()
				} else {
					// reset drawer
					mobile_drawer_position = 'closed'
					updateCurrentDrawerPosition()
				}
			}
			if(type == "chat"){
				if(chat_section_el){
					setChatDrawer()
				} else {
					// reset drawer
					mobile_drawer_position = 'closed'
					updateCurrentDrawerPosition()
				}
			}
		}

		// handle scrolling comments into view
		function scrollCommentsIntoView(){
			const yOffset = -100;
			const y = comments_section_el.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.pageYOffset + yOffset;
			window.scrollTo({ top: y, behavior: 'smooth' });
		}

		// handle opening chat by default
		window.addEventListener('load', openChatMobileAsDefault)
		function openChatMobileAsDefault(){
			if(window.innerWidth < mobile_breakpoint && mobile_drawer_items_mounted === true){
				if(media_page_mobile_drawer_content_comments && hasLinkedComment()){
					openDrawer('comments')
					return;
				}
				if(media_page_mobile_drawer_content_chat){
					openDrawer('chat')
					return;
				}
			}
		}

		function hasLinkedComment(){
			const hash = document.location.hash.match(/\#comment-(\d+)/);
			const comment_id = hash && hash[1];
			const comment = document.querySelector('li.comment-item[data-comment-id="' + comment_id + '"]')
			return !!comment;
		}

		// handle orientation change when drawer is open on mobile
		if(screen.orientation){
			screen.orientation.addEventListener('change', handleOrientationChange)
		} else {
			// fallback to resize event
			window.addEventListener('resize', handleOrientationChange)
		}
		function handleOrientationChange(){
			if(window.innerWidth < mobile_breakpoint && mobile_drawer_items_mounted == true && mobile_drawer_position !== 'closed'){
				if( isMobileDeviceLandscape() ){
					mobile_drawer_position = 'full'
				} else {
					mobile_drawer_position = 'open'
				}
				updateCurrentDrawerPosition()
			}
		}

		// handle opening mobile drawer
		media_page_mobile_drawer_open_button_els.forEach( el => {
			el.addEventListener('click', function(){
				// check to see if this is the comments button on desktop
				if(window.innerWidth > mobile_breakpoint && el.dataset.type === 'comments'){
					// scroll to comments section
					scrollCommentsIntoView()
				} else {
					openDrawer(el.dataset.type)
				}
			})
		})

		// handle closing drawer
		media_page_mobile_drawer_close_button_els.forEach( el => {
			el.addEventListener('click', () => {
				mobile_drawer_position = 'closed'
				updateCurrentDrawerPosition()
			})
		})

		// handle mounting elements on resize and for initial load
		window.addEventListener('resize', mountForMobile)

		function mountForMobile(){
			if(window.innerWidth < mobile_breakpoint && mobile_drawer_items_mounted == false){
				// mount chat and comments to mobile containers
				if(comments_section_el) media_page_mobile_drawer_content_comments?.appendChild(comments_section_el);
				if(chat_section_el) media_page_mobile_drawer_content_chat?.appendChild(chat_section_el);
				mobile_drawer_items_mounted = true;

				// add event listener for handling mobile browser url bar
				window.addEventListener('resize', updateCurrentDrawerPosition);
			}
			if(window.innerWidth >= mobile_breakpoint && mobile_drawer_items_mounted == true){
				// mount chat and comments to default desktop containers
				if(comments_section_el) media_page_comments_container?.appendChild(comments_section_el);

				// reset the state for aside chat
				// replicating this logic from chat dock.js
				// handling it here because this is where the drawer is handled
				if(media_page_chat_aside_chat_el && chat_section_el){
					media_page_chat_aside_chat_el.style.display = 'block';
					media_page_chat_aside_chat_container?.appendChild(media_page_chat_container_toggle_btn);
					media_page_chat_aside_chat_container?.appendChild(chat_section_el);
				}
				mobile_drawer_items_mounted = false;

				// remove event listener for handling mobile browser url bar
				window.removeEventListener('resize', updateCurrentDrawerPosition);

				// set drawer to closed state
				mobile_drawer_position = 'closed'
				updateCurrentDrawerPosition()
			}
		}

		// call to check on page load
		mountForMobile()
	}
